title: Do I Wanna Know?
why_this_song: Do I Wanna Know? by Arctic Monkeys (2013) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 10 times; first heard in: "(Do I wanna know?)"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "If this feelin' flows both ways?"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Crawlin' back to you"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "Ever thought of callin' when you've had a few?"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Do you ever get that fear that you can't shift the type"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: If this feelin' flows both ways?
Was sorta hopin' that you'd stay
So have you got the guts?
Been wonderin' if your heart's still open

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "know" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "know" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "both" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "both" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Have you got colour in your cheeks?
Busy being yours to fall for somebody new
Crawlin' back to you (crawlin' back to you)

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: That sticks around like summat in your teeth?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Do I Wanna Know?", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Do I Wanna Know?", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Do I Wanna Know?" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Do I Wanna Know?" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Do I Wanna Know?" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Do I Wanna Know?", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
